name: github_list_repo_access_to_self_hosted_runner_group_in_org
description: List the repositories with access to a self-hosted runner group configured in an organization (GET /orgs/{org}/actions/runner-groups/{runner_group_id}/repositories). Returns total_count and repositories. per_page 1-100 default 100, page, all_pages, max_pages. Classic tokens need admin:org scope. See GitHub REST self-hosted runner groups.
